LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF JOHN MOORE'S DEMURRER TO DEFENDANT'S ANSWER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT FOR CIVIL PENALTIES AND INJUNCTIVE RELIEF IS OFF CALENDAR. AN AMENDED ANSWER WAS FILED ON OCTOBER 12, 2011. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077
PROOF OF SERVICE OF MOTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOORE, JOHN

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS MODIFIED: PLAINTIFF JOHN MOORE'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO AUGUST 22, 2012 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPARTMENT 608. THE CIVIL PENALTY OF $3000 IS TRIVIAL AND HAS NO DETERRENT EFFECT. WHILE THE CLAIMS REGARDING ACTUALLY INCURRED FEES (OVER $90,000) ARE EXORBITANT, THE SUMS FOR WHICH MOVANT SEEKS APPROVAL APPEAR REASONABLE. COUNSEL SIGNING THE DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF THE ATTORNEYS' FEES (SAYAD) MUST PRESENT AND FILE A DECLARATION UNDER PENALTY OF PERJURY THAT ALL SUMS LISTED UNDER STATEMENT OF FEE AND COSTS (EX B) WERE ALL ACTUALLY INCURRED IN CONNECTION WITH THIS AND NO OTHER ACTION, AND NONE IS CLAIMED OR WILL BE CLAIMED IN CONNECTION WITH ANY OTHER MOTION FOR COURT APPROVAL. THE COURT TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: CURTIS E.A. KARNOW; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-21-2012 Vacated
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Prop 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Prop 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-24-2012 Continued To Aug-22-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 608
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Clifford Chanler, Esq. and Josh Voorhees, Esq. of the Chanler Group, Tel. 510.848.8850, appearing for Plaintiff and moving party;
Harrison Pollak, Esq., Deputy Attorney General, Tel. 510.622.2183, objector.

The matter was argued. The court adopted its tentative ruling as modified: PLAINTIFF JOHN MOORE'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment is continued to August 22, 2012 at 9:00 AM in Department 608. The civil penalty of $3000 is trivial and has no deterrent effect. While the claims regarding actually incurred fees (over $90,000) are exorbitant, the sums for which movant seeks approval appear reasonable. Counsel signing the declaration in support of the attorneys' fees (Sayad) must present and file a declaration under penalty of perjury that all sums listed under Statement of Fee and Costs (Ex B) were all actually incurred in connection with this and no other action, and none is claimed or will be claimed in connection with any other motion for court approval. The court to prepare order. Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-03-2012 Set For Trial On Oct-09-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-31-2011 Text Ruling

PLAINTIFF JOHN MOORE'S DEMURRER TO DEFENDANT'S ANSWER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT FOR CIVIL PENALTIES AND INJUNCTIVE RELIEF.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Off calendar. An amended answer was filed on October 12, 2011. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
